Alternatives:

Cons: Some senators did condemn violence for both sides. Risk of not passing the Act. Does it matter to you and HK??

2. Stay calm. Analyze political motives behind each event. Be creative in actions. No violence if possible unless DEFEND just enough FOR SAFETY.
Pros: The opponent party will be very frustrated if they cannot find violence to record and share! Chance of HK convincing Senator may then be higher. There was some dent which could not be fixed. We can only look forward.

1. Can you truly control your emotions which are verryyyyyy contagious in a group?

you will make your best choice after analyzing pros and cons, and political consequences on each choice
